title: Creamy Spanish Chicken Tapas Platter
description: A fresh and creamy post-workout Spanish dish featuring chicken cooked in a clay pot with stout, served as a tapas platter.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in the clay pot over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stout beer and chicken broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the chicken and sauce in small bowls as a tapas platter.
